courseleaf.title: Psychology, Doctor of Philosophy
courseleaf.informationtext:
Graduate Study

The Department offers programs of study and research leading to a Ph.D. degree in psychology. Detailed information regarding graduate study may be obtained at Graduate Students.

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See Psychology.
courseleaf.quickviewtext: The Psychology graduate program is oriented toward training students to pursue careers in the areas of research in industry and academia and teaching. Resources and faculty personnel are concentrated in five areas of Psychology; developmental, PCCN (perception, cognition, and cognitive neuroscience), biological, social and personality, and quantitative.
